tools.name: miscellaneous.addrecurrenceitem
tools.description: Adds an item to a Subscription (formerly Recurrence).

tools.name: miscellaneous.getpaymentaccounts
tools.description: Lists payment accounts of a given Subscription (formerly Recurrence) by recurrenceId.

tools.name: miscellaneous.getrecurrenceaddresses
tools.description: Retrieves the addresses attached to a given subscription (formerly recurrence) by recurrenceId.

tools.name: miscellaneous.getRecurrencebyemail
tools.description: Retrieves a given Subscription (formerly recurrence). There are three options of filtering your Subscruptions v1. It's possible to get a list of all Subscriptions v1, by not adding any query params to your request, and simply executing a call to the url. It is also possible to list the Subscriptions by email, filtering by the email query param. And finnally, it is possible to list recurrences with failures on the last execution cycle, filtering by the cycleStatus query param.

tools.name: miscellaneous.getRecurrencebyrecurrenceId
tools.description: Retrieves a given Subscription (formerly recurrence) by recurrenceId.

tools.name: miscellaneous.getrecurrencesettings
tools.description: Retrieves your store's Subscriptions' (formerly recurrence) settings.

tools.name: miscellaneous.getselfrecurrence
tools.description: Lists details of your self Subscription (formerly Recurrence).

tools.name: miscellaneous.reindexrecurrence
tools.description: Alters the frequency of a given Subscription (formerly Recurrence) by changing period and interval.

tools.name: miscellaneous.updatepartialrecurrence
tools.description: Updates partial information of a given subscription (formerly Recurrence).

tools.name: miscellaneous.updaterecurrence
tools.description: Updates details of a given Subscription (formerly recurrence).

tools.name: miscellaneous.updaterecurrencesettings
tools.description: Updates the Subscriptions' (formerly Recurrence) settings of your store by salesChannel and defaultSLA.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
